calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-17-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2014 Set For Trial On Apr-06-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION To Disqualify Defendants Counsel Sommers Employment Law Group
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF RAYMOND OWENS' Motion To Disqualify Defendants Counsel Sommers Employment Law Group is granted. Defendants' counsel has not offered any substantive opposition to the motion. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
